mentions.note: Large PE/private credit firm hit on software sector exposure in tech-heavy portfolio; 28-41% drawdowns across large PE cohort.
Tenth-worst performer (−22.3%); private equity firm with private credit exposure; actually posted beat but traded down with PE cohort fear; probably oversold but sentiment challenges remain.
Part of private credit exodus; fear-driven redemptions despite solvent loan book; expect more pain as retail realizes over-leverage to narrative risk (AI disruption).
PE firm bounced sharply with sector peers (Blackstone, Ares, Mission Universe) on realization credit crisis may not be crisis at all. Oversold momentum reversing.
Up $6 on short squeeze; private equity credit recovery suggests crisis limited; nothing unscathed but impressive gains signal bottom possibility.
